tasks.name: stall failure probe: terminate on no-progress without promoting the run
tasks.purpose: Verify that a task with no durable progress is classified as stalled_no_progress, skips blind retry, and lands as a closed failure rather than a green success.
tasks.prompt: Run a controlled failure probe that emits an initial banner, then stops producing scoped writes, heartbeats, and meaningful stdout progress long enough to trigger the no-progress watchdog.
tasks.trigger_mechanism: Start the worker, emit at most one early progress marker, then intentionally produce no further progress within the stall window so the supervisor/runner closes the attempt as stalled_no_progress and records the skipped retry decision.
pass_conditions: events.ndjson records fallback_skipped with reason stalled_no_progress

tasks.name: business validation failure probe: execution succeeds but assertion fails
tasks.purpose: Verify that a run with successful execution but failed business validation lands in business_validation, remains human_review, and never looks like ready_for_promotion.
tasks.prompt: Run a controlled failure probe that completes execution and writes the expected work product, but intentionally omits a required business marker so a deterministic validator fails the run.
tasks.trigger_mechanism: Allow the worker to finish successfully and emit a valid patch/artifact set, then run a deterministic validator named phase2.business_assertion.required_marker that fails because the required marker or section is intentionally absent.
